channel.title: Artsy
channel.description: Updates for Artsy — native macOS sketchpad with Metal rendering, tablet support, and AI image generation.

item.title: Version 0.2.0
item.description:
• Configurable canvas + brush defaults in Settings → General
  • Custom in-app color picker with recent colors and presets
  • Auto-update via Sparkle (first release with updater)
  • Unsaved-changes prompt before quit, with window dot + tab-bar bullet
  • Much faster save — GPU-batched + non-blocking PNG encoding
